race.comment: STRAPPING PROPHET (3) missed in a photo fresh before a 1.9L defeat at Belmont most recently when storming home again. Out to 1700m is a big tick now and he's third-up for Whiting. Will need a bit of luck, but he'll relish the sting out of the ground and he can get back to winning ways. ARTISTRY IN MOTION (1) finished 1.5L off the winner fresh and was just 1.1L away on the main track here 22 days ago. He rates highly on that effort and still looks a progressive type on the rise. Should get every chance from the draw and can make his presence felt. I'M NIPOTE (4) gets the Blinkers on for the first time today after a disappointing effort last time out. Back out in trip today looks a good move and CJP hops on board. Can fire a shot getting back in grade today. FLAMING RONDA (8) bolted in over the mile here last time out and can go on with the job. CAPE LEEUWIN (6) won't be far away.
